title: RecordsRequest
description: A request to DORIS to retrieve a record — order a copy/scan of a historical vital record, an archival photograph or digital item, or a City Hall Library publication, OR file a FOIL (Freedom of Information Law) request for agency records. NET-NEW: there is NO public write API today. Ordering a certified vital record runs through the Historical Vital Records portal (a860-historicalvitalrecords.nyc.gov); archival reproductions are ordered by email/form; FOIL runs through the OpenRecords portal (nyc.gov/openrecords). This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a requester's own requests) and the write surface (submit a request).

requestId.description: Server-assigned request / order number (OpenRecords Request ID or vital-records order number). Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by DORIS, not the requester ('Request Status').

requestType.description: What kind of retrieval this is.

subject.description: What is being requested — one of these depending on requestType.

vitalRecord.description: For requestType=VitalRecordCopy — identify the indexed record.

itemIdentifier.description: For ArchivalReproduction / LibraryPublication — the DigitalItem, ArchivalCollection, or GovernmentPublication identifier.

description.description: For FOIL or free-text requests — a description of the records sought.

agencyName.description: For FOIL — the agency that holds the records ('Agency Name').

purpose.description: Genealogy, legal, research, commercial, press, etc.

submissionMethod.description: How the request is submitted ('Submission Method'). Emergency/expedited paths are handled offline.

relationship.description: Relationship to the record subject (for restricted vital records).
